case_title: DETTMAN, ROBERT VS BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-16-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DETTMAN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUANCE REQUEST TO 6/26/98 FILED BY PLFT. SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DETTMAN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00, PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BARNEY'S NOE VALLEY HAMBURGERS
